betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The horde that has taken over Earth is composed of two separate types of undead. 
Most are Meatball Fiends, clearly aspected to the essence of my opponent, gluttonous souls directly under his will, his direct subjects.
The remaining few, they are of a different nature. First and foremost, they are Undead, and and the touch of the Meatball Man plays a smaller role to their nature.
These creatures, they have been around for longer than the Meatball Man. These are Undead of the precedecessor of the Meatball Man.
These creatures, they act in a different fashion. As they fight, they are muttering words, in the True Tongue.
Regardless, they are now under his control, and they shall be annhilated.
Now that I think about it, my first encounter with a Sentient Meatball was from within one of such creatures. Not a Meatball Fiend. It too, was speaking as it was fighting. Was it the true tongue?
These words that are being spoken, I do not understand what it is that they are saying.
betterquesting:10.name:8: As it was, so is now
